text: Good morning! Can you pull up today's calendar and reminders?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, December 22. No work meetings today. You have Lily's swim lesson at the aquatic center and working on the garage cabinetry.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that the kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Logged that. I can help troubleshoot that. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. I'll update the home maintenance log.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good way to wrap up the day. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is practicing Für Elise for the upcoming piano recital. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. Busy day for sports! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Just wanted to mention that planning our weekly meals today. We want to try a home-cooked chicken parmesan on Thursday. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. Recipe saved. I've added marinara and mozzarella to the grocery list. I'll set a reminder for lunch prep.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! I've mapped the locations. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I can suggest more board games.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Checking on some house maintenance items. I think the spark plug on the mower is dirty. Glad I caught it early.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Let's get that resolved. I can look up a quick spark plug cleaning guide for your mower model. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. It is nice to have some quiet time.
title: Personal Update

text: Personal time is valuable. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick log: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. Busy day for sports! Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Planning our weekly meals today. We need a quick dinner that the kids will actually eat. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. Meal planning saves so much time. How about taco night? It's fast, and you have beef and shells ready. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we got invited to a neighbor's house. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Good weekend progress on home projects. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Had a great catch-up with the neighbors. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
